requirement: Write architecture spec, DB migrations, and OpenAPI contract for the securities module. Specs only — no service implementation.

tasks.title: Securities architecture spec
tasks.description: Write comprehensive architecture spec at docs/securities-architecture.md covering: asset classes (equities/bonds/ETFs), instrument model (ISIN/CUSIP/lot_size/tick_size), order types with validation, T+2 settlement state machine (PENDING->AFFIRMED->NETTED->INSTRUCTED->SETTLING->SETTLED/FAILED), CSD integration, DB schema for V26-V28, gateway API routes (/api/v1/securities/*), Kafka topics. Reference docs/T033_gateway_spec.md for format. Be specific about data types, field names, enums — implementation agents will code from this.

tasks.title: Securities DB migrations V26-V28
tasks.description: Write SQL migrations based on T1 spec. Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md + docs/securities-architecture.md. Create: V26__securities_instruments.sql (instruments, bonds, position_limits), V27__securities_trading.sql (orders, trades, positions), V28__securities_settlement.sql (settlement_instructions, netting_batches, corporate_actions, custody_accounts). Follow conventions from infrastructure/db/migrations/V24 or V25.

tasks.title: Securities OpenAPI contract spec
tasks.description: Write OpenAPI 3.0 YAML at docs/securities-openapi.yaml based on T1 spec. Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md + docs/securities-architecture.md. Reference docs/T033_openapi.yaml for format. Cover: instruments CRUD, orders (submit/list/cancel/amend with lot/tick validation), positions (list/summary), settlements (list/cycle/netting), corporate-actions (list/announce). Include request/response schemas with all fields, types, enums, examples.
